title: Panic in "podman system df"
body:
### Issue Description

When running the podman build command continuously for some of our internal project, it throws panic on "podman system df" command.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

It happens when building multistage image on multiple retries

### Describe the results you received

```
[root@lima-podman-rootful ~]# podman --debug system df
```
